//paths: The compilerOptions.paths above decouple `std/*` self-imports (proof/ has 116) from the package `name`, so resolution survives the name flip to @pedroibl/std. Before this, `std/core` resolved ONLY via Bun package self-referencing (name==="std"); Bun + tsc both honor these paths, and they mirror how a published consumer resolves via node_modules/std.
//exclude-dashkit: src/dashkit/ is the second Obsidian DOM edge (note-report vault); like src/cn/ it typechecks under its own scoped config via `bun run typecheck:dashkit` (Gate 3d), never here.
//exclude: src/cn/ is an Obsidian DOM edge and cannot typecheck under this Bun-shaped config (no DOM lib — that absence IS the barrier keeping DOM out of core). It typechecks under its own src/cn/tsconfig.json via `bun run typecheck:cn`, wired into CI and `make gates`. proof/tsconfig.json declares its own exclude, so this one never reaches it.
